metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_5520
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3: In hippocampal neurons from AP-2u (gene Ap2m1) knockout mice, the ablated expression of the AP-2 complex was shown to result in defective endocytosis of VGLUT1-labeled synaptic vesicles (SV).

While no comparable data is available for the alpha-adaptin subunits of the clathrin adaptor AP-2, it has been shown that;
- AP2A is involved in SV endocytosis in C.elegans (PMID:23482940) and Drosophila (PMID:9118220)
- AP2A1 and AP2A2 are both abundant in mammalian synaptic vesicles (PMID:33376223)

Taken together, we here annotate AP2A1 as involved in synaptic vesicle endocytosis. Experimental description: Result text; "We conditionally ablated AP-2 expression by tamoxifen induction of Cre recombinase in hippocampal neurons from Ap2m1lox/lox mice crossed with"
